ab: Haiza naak u’uskunan vingkiu tupaun tu Lumav, qanglas aipa panpungul madas qaimangsut.
ch: 我有一個同學叫魯馬夫，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Lumav, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Maqi isnavan a, simul aipa isia ta u’uskunan vingkiu tu ispapatas, isqaqaiqais maqi nii a papatasan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Mutas’a, mudusa, mutau, amin pasimul istaa qaimangsut.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Qaal haiza istaa madikla tu sinkuzakuza, qanglas simul a nii tu masuqis.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Kinuzin a amin as’nii mapasimul istaa.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Haiza tu tas’a qanian, muskun aam munata mudandan qaitmal.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: Ihaan daan, asa Lumav munhaan unanataan, qaal panpungul madas isqaqaisu.
ch: 路途中，魯馬夫想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Lumav wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: Simul aipa haan u’uskunan vingkiu i isqaqaisu, qaal amin antalam tu, nii aak amin saimadas.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Lumav minkaivakaiva santangis. Mahau aipa tupa tu, mavia amuu nii tu pasimul i isqaqaisu!
ch: 魯馬夫急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Lumav burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: U’uskunan vingkiu taqu istaa, aupa nii aas anak madas, amin tu pasimul suu tu qaimangsut, nii tu masuqis!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Laqbingin munKaku, Lumav tingmut ang munKaku in, Lumav butun istaa sinimulan u’uskunan tu qaimangsut suqaisun in istaa.
ch: 隔天上學，魯馬夫很早就到學校了，魯馬夫把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Lumav arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Lumav mansumanai i u’uskunan ta, musasu tupa tu na anak in madas qaimangsut, man uninang u’uskunan vingkiu maqtu haihaip ti mapasimul qaimangsut.
ch: 魯馬夫向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Lumav apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
